category.name: zoo.advancedBreed
category.item: Hi! I'm Soňa Starostlivá, a nurse here at the zoo. Are you looking forward to breeding the new cute cubs? I'll explain how it works! First, you have to decide which animal species you want to breed.
Choose two adult animals from your inventory to become parents. The rarer they are, the more likely they are to have an even rarer baby. However, the parents must remain with me for this breeding.
Using additional collected items, strong feed, super feed, or super medicine will increase your chances of raising a particularly rare baby. The more hearts the item has, the better the chance!
You're almost done with preparations! Double-check your choices before it all kicks off. Want to change something? No problem, just use the "Back" button!
The breeding experiment used the following animals and items:

category.name: zoo.advancedBreed.tooltip
category.item: Breeding station ready
This is where it is bred
A baby is born!
The babies are here!

category.name: zoo.advancedBreed.button
category.item: Start breeding
Use essence

category.name: zoo.advancedBreed.layer
category.item: Do you really want to start breeding without any supplements? Think carefully—with supplements, you have a better chance of getting a rare offspring.
You're in the middle of preparations. Do you really want to leave the breeding station?
Breeding station
These animals are having babies right now:
Time remaining:
Essence of Tolija
Tolija essence shortens the breeding time by 50%.
Hooray - you have a baby! You can find this cute little one in your inventory:
Hooray - you have a child! You can find this cute imp in your inventory:
Move the little one to the animal nursery to grow up.
Bring the little ones to the animal nursery so they can grow up.

Warning: Breeding is currently in progress! If you move the station to your inventory now, the process will be interrupted and you will lose all animals and supplements. Are you sure you want to move it now?
Warning: Breeding is currently in progress! If you sell the station now, the process will be interrupted and all animals and supplements will be lost. Are you sure you want to sell the station now?
If the breeding process is completed after the event ends, you will only receive 1 baby.
